query:
-- Count all SmileTel bundle billing items
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unlinked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked
FROM billing_items 
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%';
